summary: Iteration 42 - Tested Payment Settings Admin Tab, India Pricing Validation, and Enrollment Page enhancements. Backend: 17/17 tests passed. Frontend: All core features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Test enrollments created during API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment Settings Admin tab fully working. India payment links (Exly, GPay, Bank Transfer) are saved in settings. India pricing validation blocks INR for: non-India IP, VPN/proxy users, users with non-Indian phone numbers. Country code auto-updates when country changes in enrollment form.

tests: Tab loads correctly with disclaimer and India links
Add India Link button works (adds new link row)
3 existing India links displayed (Exly, GPay, Bank Transfer)
Non-India IP user gets AED/USD (not INR)
India country + non-India IP = no INR (VPN protection)
No phone provided = phone_consistent passes (email OTP flow)
Pricing response has all required security checks
UAE user gets AED or USD
Payment disclaimer shown in amber box
Country change auto-updates phone code (+91 for India, +971 for UAE)

enrollment_page_step3_india_options.note: Cannot fully test Step 3 without email verification, but code shows india-payment-options render when bookerCountry=IN and india_links exist

test_classes: TestPaymentSettingsAPI (4 tests) - GET/PUT settings with payment fields
TestPricingWithOfferPrice (1 test) - Offer price in response

inr_eligibility_checks.phone_consistent: If phone provided, must start with +91; no phone = pass

pricing_validation_logic.all_checks_must_pass: For INR pricing, all 4 checks must be True
